'''Kol Huro I''' was the innermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Kol Huro system/Legends|Kol Huro system]]. Like other planets in the [[Star system/Legends|system]], Kol Huro I was harvested for its natural resources during the years leading up to the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], as the tyrant who controlled the system began mass-producing weapons and battle [[Droid/Legends|droids]] for his own protection.
